chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4447 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.2886/2024 2. For hearing of Misc. No.2887/2024 3. For hearing of Misc. No.32473/2022 4. For hearing of Misc. No.32474/2022 (u/s 94 PPC) 5. For hearing of Misc. No.19240/2017 (Stay/A) 6. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 14.10.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Effendi, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, A.A.G. Ms. Humaira Jatoi, advocate for respondent/SBCA Mr. Tariq Ali, advocate for respondent ------------------------------------------ Learned counsel for petitioner is directed to file an application for regularization of the newly built floors of the subject building before the Director General, Sindh Building Control Authority who, if such an application is received, shall decide the same within three months of the date of this order, according to their own SPOs, after hearing the petitioner and any other concerned parties, through a speaking order. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General, Sindh Building Control Authority for compliance. This petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
